scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api,agent -c green,blue,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @eco-carpool/shared && npm run build -w @eco-carpool/api && npm run build -w @eco-carpool/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @eco-carpool/shared && npm run typecheck -w @eco-carpool/api && npm run typecheck -w @eco-carpool/web
